Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]） – [[:en:Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion|Fujiwara Nakamaro Rebellion]]. In this uprising, Emperor {{ill|Kōken|ja|孝謙上皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōken|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 孝謙天皇|1=Kōken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232955}}’s favorite retainer, [[:en:Dōkyō|Dōkyō]], was targeted by [[:en:Fujiwara no Nakamaro|Fujiwara Nakamaro]]. * [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:810|810]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]]) – The [[:en:Kusuko Incident|Yakushi no Hen]] occurred. In this incident, [[:en:Fujiwara no Kusuko|Fujiwara Yakushi]] and [[:en:Fujiwara no Nakanari|Fujiwara Chūsei]] (displayed as “仲成”) attempted, unsuccessfully, to restore [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Emperor Heizei]]. * [[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – In the [[:en:Genkō War|Genkō Rebellion]], when Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Go-Daigo]] found himself in dire straits, he summoned [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]], who then raised an army.
== Births == * [[:en:Kankō|Kankō]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1008|1008]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Ichijō|Emperor Go-Ichijō]], the 68th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1036|1036]]). * {{ill|Daiji|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji|1=Daiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Shirakawa|Emperor Go-Shirakawa]], the 77th Emperor (died [[:en:1192|1192]]). * [[:en:Kenji (era)|Kenji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1276|1276]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]]) – [[:en:Prince Hisaaki|Prince Hisahime]], who served as the 8th [[:en:Shogun|Shōgun]] under the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1328|1328]]). * {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 13rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1544|1544]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]]) – [[:en:Takenaka Shigeharu|Takenaka Shigeharu]] (died [[:en:1579|1579]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1709|1709]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – {{ill|Kusuki Genkō|ja|朽木玄綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusuki Genkō|1=Kutsuki Tōtsuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10729461}} (died [[:en:1770|1770]]) with the additional note “秋篠宮妃紀子”.
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenroku|Tenroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:972|972]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Kūya|Kūya]], the founder of the {{ill|Odori Nenbutsu|ja|踊念仏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Odori Nenbutsu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 念仏|1=nianfo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1315754}} tradition (born [[:en:903|903]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1585|1585]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]]) – [[:en:Tachibana Dōsetsu|Tachibana Michiyuki]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165|qq=}}, a {{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (born [[:en:1513|1513]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1603|1603]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]]) – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Nobuyoshi]], the fifth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (born [[:en:1583|1583]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1718|1718]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]]) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashiro|ja|徳川綱條|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsunashiro|1=Tokugawa Tsunaeda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6997897}}, the 3rd head of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] (born [[:en:1656|1656]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1833|1833]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]]) – [[:en:Motoori Ōhira|Motoori Ohira]], a scholar of kokugaku (born [[:en:1756|1756]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 14th year, intercalary 9th month ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1843|1843]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]]) – [[:en:Hirata Atsutane|Hirata Atsutomi]], a kokugakuist (born [[:en:1776|1776]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|10|9|12|8|11|10|9|0911|qq=}}

== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenroku|Tenroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:972|972]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Kūya|Kūya]], the founder of the {{ill|Odori Nenbutsu|ja|踊念仏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Odori Nenbutsu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 念仏|1=nianfo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1315754}} tradition (born [[:en:903|903]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1585|1585]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]]) – [[:en:Tachibana Dōsetsu|Tachibana Michiyuki]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165|qq=}}, a {{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (born [[:en:1513|1513]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1603|1603]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]]) – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Nobuyoshi]], the fifth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (born [[:en:1583|1583]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1718|1718]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]]) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashiro|ja|徳川綱條|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsunashiro|1=Tokugawa Tsunaeda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6997897}}, the 3rd head of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] (born [[:en:1656|1656]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1833|1833]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]]) – [[:en:Motoori Ōhira|Motoori Ohira]], a scholar of kokugaku (born [[:en:1756|1756]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 14th year, intercalary 9th month ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1843|1843]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]]) – [[:en:Hirata Atsutane|Hirata Atsutomi]], a kokugakuist (born [[:en:1776|1776]]).

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十一]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十一]] {{wikidata link|Q840151}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十一]][[zh:九月十一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840151]] Wikidata name: 11th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 11|qq=September 11}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]） – [[:en:Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion|Fujiwara Nakamaro Rebellion]]. In this uprising, Emperor {{ill|Kōken|ja|孝謙上皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōken|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 孝謙天皇|1=Kōken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232955}}’s favorite retainer, [[:en:Dōkyō|Dōkyō]], was targeted by [[:en:Fujiwara no Nakamaro|Fujiwara Nakamaro]]. * [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:810|810]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]]) – The [[:en:Kusuko Incident|Yakushi no Hen]] occurred. In this incident, [[:en:Fujiwara no Kusuko|Fujiwara Yakushi]] and [[:en:Fujiwara no Nakanari|Fujiwara Chūsei]] (displayed as “仲成”) attempted, unsuccessfully, to restore [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Emperor Heizei]]. * [[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – In the [[:en:Genkō War|Genkō Rebellion]], when Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Go-Daigo]] found himself in dire straits, he summoned [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]], who then raised an army.
== Births == * [[:en:Kankō|Kankō]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1008|1008]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Ichijō|Emperor Go-Ichijō]], the 68th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1036|1036]]). * {{ill|Daiji|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji|1=Daiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Shirakawa|Emperor Go-Shirakawa]], the 77th Emperor (died [[:en:1192|1192]]). * [[:en:Kenji (era)|Kenji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1276|1276]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]]) – [[:en:Prince Hisaaki|Prince Hisahime]], who served as the 8th [[:en:Shogun|Shōgun]] under the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1328|1328]]). * {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 13rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1544|1544]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]]) – [[:en:Takenaka Shigeharu|Takenaka Shigeharu]] (died [[:en:1579|1579]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1709|1709]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – {{ill|Kusuki Genkō|ja|朽木玄綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusuki Genkō|1=Kutsuki Tōtsuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10729461}} (died [[:en:1770|1770]]) with the additional note “秋篠宮妃紀子”.
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenroku|Tenroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:972|972]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Kūya|Kūya]], the founder of the {{ill|Odori Nenbutsu|ja|踊念仏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Odori Nenbutsu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 念仏|1=nianfo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1315754}} tradition (born [[:en:903|903]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1585|1585]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]]) – [[:en:Tachibana Dōsetsu|Tachibana Michiyuki]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165|qq=}}, a {{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (born [[:en:1513|1513]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1603|1603]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]]) – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Nobuyoshi]], the fifth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (born [[:en:1583|1583]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1718|1718]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]]) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashiro|ja|徳川綱條|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsunashiro|1=Tokugawa Tsunaeda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6997897}}, the 3rd head of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] (born [[:en:1656|1656]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1833|1833]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]]) – [[:en:Motoori Ōhira|Motoori Ohira]], a scholar of kokugaku (born [[:en:1756|1756]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 14th year, intercalary 9th month ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1843|1843]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]]) – [[:en:Hirata Atsutane|Hirata Atsutomi]], a kokugakuist (born [[:en:1776|1776]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|10|9|12|8|11|10|9|0911|qq=}}

== Births == * [[:en:Kankō|Kankō]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1008|1008]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Ichijō|Emperor Go-Ichijō]], the 68th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1036|1036]]). * {{ill|Daiji|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji|1=Daiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Shirakawa|Emperor Go-Shirakawa]], the 77th Emperor (died [[:en:1192|1192]]). * [[:en:Kenji (era)|Kenji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1276|1276]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]]) – [[:en:Prince Hisaaki|Prince Hisahime]], who served as the 8th [[:en:Shogun|Shōgun]] under the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1328|1328]]). * {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 13rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1544|1544]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]]) – [[:en:Takenaka Shigeharu|Takenaka Shigeharu]] (died [[:en:1579|1579]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1709|1709]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – {{ill|Kusuki Genkō|ja|朽木玄綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusuki Genkō|1=Kutsuki Tōtsuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10729461}} (died [[:en:1770|1770]]) with the additional note “秋篠宮妃紀子”.
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenroku|Tenroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:972|972]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Kūya|Kūya]], the founder of the {{ill|Odori Nenbutsu|ja|踊念仏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Odori Nenbutsu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 念仏|1=nianfo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1315754}} tradition (born [[:en:903|903]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1585|1585]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]]) – [[:en:Tachibana Dōsetsu|Tachibana Michiyuki]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165|qq=}}, a {{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (born [[:en:1513|1513]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1603|1603]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]]) – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Nobuyoshi]], the fifth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (born [[:en:1583|1583]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1718|1718]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]]) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashiro|ja|徳川綱條|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsunashiro|1=Tokugawa Tsunaeda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6997897}}, the 3rd head of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] (born [[:en:1656|1656]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1833|1833]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]]) – [[:en:Motoori Ōhira|Motoori Ohira]], a scholar of kokugaku (born [[:en:1756|1756]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 14th year, intercalary 9th month ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1843|1843]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]]) – [[:en:Hirata Atsutane|Hirata Atsutomi]], a kokugakuist (born [[:en:1776|1776]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 11일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月十一]][[zh:九月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 11일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月十一]][[zh:九月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十一]][[zh:九月十一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840151]] Wikidata name: 11th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 11|qq=September 11}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]） – [[:en:Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion|Fujiwara Nakamaro Rebellion]]. In this uprising, Emperor {{ill|Kōken|ja|孝謙上皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōken|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 孝謙天皇|1=Kōken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232955}}’s favorite retainer, [[:en:Dōkyō|Dōkyō]], was targeted by [[:en:Fujiwara no Nakamaro|Fujiwara Nakamaro]]. * [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:810|810]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]]) – The [[:en:Kusuko Incident|Yakushi no Hen]] occurred. In this incident, [[:en:Fujiwara no Kusuko|Fujiwara Yakushi]] and [[:en:Fujiwara no Nakanari|Fujiwara Chūsei]] (displayed as “仲成”) attempted, unsuccessfully, to restore [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Emperor Heizei]]. * [[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – In the [[:en:Genkō War|Genkō Rebellion]], when Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Go-Daigo]] found himself in dire straits, he summoned [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]], who then raised an army.
== Births == * [[:en:Kankō|Kankō]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1008|1008]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Ichijō|Emperor Go-Ichijō]], the 68th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1036|1036]]). * {{ill|Daiji|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji|1=Daiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Shirakawa|Emperor Go-Shirakawa]], the 77th Emperor (died [[:en:1192|1192]]). * [[:en:Kenji (era)|Kenji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1276|1276]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]]) – [[:en:Prince Hisaaki|Prince Hisahime]], who served as the 8th [[:en:Shogun|Shōgun]] under the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1328|1328]]). * {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 13rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1544|1544]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]]) – [[:en:Takenaka Shigeharu|Takenaka Shigeharu]] (died [[:en:1579|1579]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1709|1709]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – {{ill|Kusuki Genkō|ja|朽木玄綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusuki Genkō|1=Kutsuki Tōtsuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10729461}} (died [[:en:1770|1770]]) with the additional note “秋篠宮妃紀子”.
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenroku|Tenroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:972|972]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Kūya|Kūya]], the founder of the {{ill|Odori Nenbutsu|ja|踊念仏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Odori Nenbutsu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 念仏|1=nianfo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1315754}} tradition (born [[:en:903|903]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1585|1585]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]]) – [[:en:Tachibana Dōsetsu|Tachibana Michiyuki]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165|qq=}}, a {{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (born [[:en:1513|1513]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1603|1603]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]]) – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Nobuyoshi]], the fifth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (born [[:en:1583|1583]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1718|1718]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]]) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashiro|ja|徳川綱條|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsunashiro|1=Tokugawa Tsunaeda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6997897}}, the 3rd head of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] (born [[:en:1656|1656]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1833|1833]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]]) – [[:en:Motoori Ōhira|Motoori Ohira]], a scholar of kokugaku (born [[:en:1756|1756]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 14th year, intercalary 9th month ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1843|1843]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]]) – [[:en:Hirata Atsutane|Hirata Atsutomi]], a kokugakuist (born [[:en:1776|1776]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月十一]][[zh:九月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月十一]][[zh:九月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十一]][[zh:九月十一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840151]] Wikidata name: 11th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 11|qq=September 11}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]） – [[:en:Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion|Fujiwara Nakamaro Rebellion]]. In this uprising, Emperor {{ill|Kōken|ja|孝謙上皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōken|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 孝謙天皇|1=Kōken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232955}}’s favorite retainer, [[:en:Dōkyō|Dōkyō]], was targeted by [[:en:Fujiwara no Nakamaro|Fujiwara Nakamaro]]. * [[:en:Kōnin (era)|Kōnin]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:810|810]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]]) – The [[:en:Kusuko Incident|Yakushi no Hen]] occurred. In this incident, [[:en:Fujiwara no Kusuko|Fujiwara Yakushi]] and [[:en:Fujiwara no Nakanari|Fujiwara Chūsei]] (displayed as “仲成”) attempted, unsuccessfully, to restore [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Emperor Heizei]]. * [[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – In the [[:en:Genkō War|Genkō Rebellion]], when Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Go-Daigo]] found himself in dire straits, he summoned [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]], who then raised an army.
== Births == * [[:en:Kankō|Kankō]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1008|1008]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Ichijō|Emperor Go-Ichijō]], the 68th Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1036|1036]]). * {{ill|Daiji|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji|1=Daiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:October 18|October 18]]) – [[:en:Emperor Go-Shirakawa|Emperor Go-Shirakawa]], the 77th Emperor (died [[:en:1192|1192]]). * [[:en:Kenji (era)|Kenji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1276|1276]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]]) – [[:en:Prince Hisaaki|Prince Hisahime]], who served as the 8th [[:en:Shogun|Shōgun]] under the Kamakura shogunate (died [[:en:1328|1328]]). * {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q21096812}} 13rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1544|1544]] [[:en:September 27|September 27]]) – [[:en:Takenaka Shigeharu|Takenaka Shigeharu]] (died [[:en:1579|1579]]). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 6th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1709|1709]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – {{ill|Kusuki Genkō|ja|朽木玄綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusuki Genkō|1=Kutsuki Tōtsuna|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10729461}} (died [[:en:1770|1770]]) with the additional note “秋篠宮妃紀子”.
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenroku|Tenroku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:972|972]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Kūya|Kūya]], the founder of the {{ill|Odori Nenbutsu|ja|踊念仏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Odori Nenbutsu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 念仏|1=nianfo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1315754}} tradition (born [[:en:903|903]]). * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 13rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1585|1585]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]]) – [[:en:Tachibana Dōsetsu|Tachibana Michiyuki]] {{Sfn|楠戸|2009|p=165|qq=}}, a {{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} (born [[:en:1513|1513]]). * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1603|1603]] [[:en:October 15|October 15]]) – [[:en:Takeda Nobuyoshi|Takeda Nobuyoshi]], the fifth son of [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] (born [[:en:1583|1583]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1718|1718]] [[:en:October 4|October 4]]) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunashiro|ja|徳川綱條|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsunashiro|1=Tokugawa Tsunaeda|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6997897}}, the 3rd head of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] (born [[:en:1656|1656]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 4th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1833|1833]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]]) – [[:en:Motoori Ōhira|Motoori Ohira]], a scholar of kokugaku (born [[:en:1756|1756]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 14th year, intercalary 9th month ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1843|1843]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]]) – [[:en:Hirata Atsutane|Hirata Atsutomi]], a kokugakuist (born [[:en:1776|1776]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Tenpyō-hōji|Tenpyō-hōji]] 8th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:764|764]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]]） – [[:en:Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion|Fujiwara Nakamaro Rebellion]]. In this incident, [[:en:Fujiwara no Kusuko|Fujiwara Yakushi]] and [[:en:Fujiwara no Nakanari|Fujiwara Chūsei]] (displayed as “仲成”) attempted, unsuccessfully, to restore [[:en:Emperor Heizei|Emperor Heizei]]. * [[:en:Gentoku|Gentoku]] 3rd year / [[:en:Genkō (1331–1334)|Genkō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1331|1331]] [[:en:October 13|October 13]]) – In the [[:en:Genkō War|Genkō Rebellion]], when Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Daigo|Go-Daigo]] found himself in dire straits, he summoned [[:en:Kusunoki Masashige|Kusunoki Masashige]], who then raised an army.

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. In this uprising, Emperor {{ill|Kōken|ja|孝謙上皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōken|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 孝謙天皇|1=Kōken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232955}}’s favorite retainer, {{ill|Dōkyō|en|Dōkyō|WD=Q1272718|lt=Dōkyō}}, was targeted by {{ill|Fujiwara no Nakamaro|en|Fujiwara no Nakamaro|WD=Q540305|lt=Fujiwara Nakamaro}}. * {{ill|Kōnin (era)|en|Kōnin (era)|WD=Q1373070|lt=Kōnin}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|810|en|810|WD=Q23819|lt=810}} {{ill|October 12|en|October 12|WD=Q2920|lt=October 12}}) – The {{ill|Kusuko Incident|en|Kusuko Incident|WD=Q5358176|lt=Yakushi no Hen}} occurred. In this incident, {{ill|Fujiwara no Kusuko|en|Fujiwara no Kusuko|WD=Q10514092|lt=Fujiwara Yakushi}} and {{ill|Fujiwara no Nakanari|en|Fujiwara no Nakanari|WD=Q11623015|lt=Fujiwara Chūsei}} (displayed as “仲成”) attempted, unsuccessfully, to restore {{ill|Emperor Heizei|en|Emperor Heizei|WD=Q353558|lt=Emperor Heizei}}. * {{ill|Gentoku|en|Gentoku|WD=Q1327385|lt=Gentoku}} 3rd year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1331|en|1331|WD=Q6000|lt=1331}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13}}) – In the {{ill|Genkō War|en|Genkō War|WD=Q1432624|lt=Genkō Rebellion}}, when Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|WD=Q313942|lt=Go-Daigo}} found himself in dire straits, he summoned {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|en|Kusunoki Masashige|WD=Q382234|lt=Kusunoki Masashige}}, who then raised an army.

In this incident, {{ill|Fujiwara no Kusuko|en|Fujiwara no Kusuko|WD=Q10514092|lt=Fujiwara Yakushi}} and {{ill|Fujiwara no Nakanari|en|Fujiwara no Nakanari|WD=Q11623015|lt=Fujiwara Chūsei}} (displayed as “仲成”) attempted, unsuccessfully, to restore {{ill|Emperor Heizei|en|Emperor Heizei|WD=Q353558|lt=Emperor Heizei}}. * {{ill|Gentoku|en|Gentoku|WD=Q1327385|lt=Gentoku}} 3rd year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1331|en|1331|WD=Q6000|lt=1331}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13}}) – In the {{ill|Genkō War|en|Genkō War|WD=Q1432624|lt=Genkō Rebellion}}, when Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|WD=Q313942|lt=Go-Daigo}} found himself in dire straits, he summoned {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|en|Kusunoki Masashige|WD=Q382234|lt=Kusunoki Masashige}}, who then raised an army.

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|en|Tenpyō-hōji|WD=Q1346307|lt=Tenpyō-hōji|1=Tenpyō-hōji}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|764|en|764|WD=Q31163|lt=764|1=764}} {{ill|October 10|en|October 10|WD=Q2921|lt=October 10|1=October 10}}） – {{ill|Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion|en|Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion|WD=Q11623017|lt=Fujiwara Nakamaro Rebellion|1=Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion}}. In this uprising, Emperor {{ill|Kōken|ja|孝謙上皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōken|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 孝謙天皇|1=Empress Kōken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232955}}’s favorite retainer, {{ill|Dōkyō|en|Dōkyō|WD=Q1272718|lt=Dōkyō|1=Dōkyō}}, was targeted by {{ill|Fujiwara no Nakamaro|en|Fujiwara no Nakamaro|WD=Q540305|lt=Fujiwara Nakamaro|1=Fujiwara no Nakamaro}}. * {{ill|Kōnin (era)|en|Kōnin (era)|WD=Q1373070|lt=Kōnin|1=Kōnin (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|810|en|810|WD=Q23819|lt=810|1=810}} {{ill|October 12|en|October 12|WD=Q2920|lt=October 12|1=October 12}}) – The {{ill|Kusuko Incident|en|Kusuko Incident|WD=Q5358176|lt=Yakushi no Hen|1=Kusuko Incident}} occurred. In this incident, {{ill|Fujiwara no Kusuko|en|Fujiwara no Kusuko|WD=Q10514092|lt=Fujiwara Yakushi|1=Fujiwara no Kusuko}} and {{ill|Fujiwara no Nakanari|en|Fujiwara no Nakanari|WD=Q11623015|lt=Fujiwara Chūsei|1=Fujiwara no Nakanari}} (displayed as “仲成”) attempted, unsuccessfully, to restore {{ill|Emperor Heizei|en|Emperor Heizei|WD=Q353558|lt=Emperor Heizei|1=Emperor Heizei}}. * {{ill|Gentoku|en|Gentoku|WD=Q1327385|lt=Gentoku|1=Gentoku}} 3rd year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō (1331–1334)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1331|en|1331|WD=Q6000|lt=1331|1=1331}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13|1=October 13}}) – In the {{ill|Genkō War|en|Genkō War|WD=Q1432624|lt=Genkō Rebellion|1=Genkō War}}, when Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|WD=Q313942|lt=Go-Daigo|1=Emperor Go-Daigo}} found himself in dire straits, he summoned {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|en|Kusunoki Masashige|WD=Q382234|lt=Kusunoki Masashige|1=Kusunoki Masashige}}, who then raised an army.

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō-hōji|en|Tenpyō-hōji|WD=Q1346307|lt=Tenpyō-hōji|1=Tenpyō-hōji}} 8th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|764|en|764|WD=Q31163|lt=764|1=764}} {{ill|October 10|en|October 10|WD=Q2921|lt=October 10|1=October 10}}） – {{ill|Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion|en|Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion|WD=Q11623017|lt=Fujiwara Nakamaro Rebellion|1=Fujiwara no Nakamaro Rebellion}}. In this uprising, Emperor {{ill|Kōken|ja|孝謙上皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōken|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 孝謙天皇|1=Empress Kōken|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q232955}}’s favorite retainer, {{ill|Dōkyō|en|Dōkyō|WD=Q1272718|lt=Dōkyō|1=Dōkyō}}, was targeted by {{ill|Fujiwara no Nakamaro|en|Fujiwara no Nakamaro|WD=Q540305|lt=Fujiwara Nakamaro|1=Fujiwara no Nakamaro}}. * {{ill|Kōnin (era)|en|Kōnin (era)|WD=Q1373070|lt=Kōnin|1=Kōnin (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|810|en|810|WD=Q23819|lt=810|1=810}} {{ill|October 12|en|October 12|WD=Q2920|lt=October 12|1=October 12}}) – The {{ill|Kusuko Incident|en|Kusuko Incident|WD=Q5358176|lt=Yakushi no Hen|1=Kusuko Incident}} occurred. In this incident, {{ill|Fujiwara no Kusuko|en|Fujiwara no Kusuko|WD=Q10514092|lt=Fujiwara Yakushi|1=Fujiwara no Kusuko}} and {{ill|Fujiwara no Nakanari|en|Fujiwara no Nakanari|WD=Q11623015|lt=Fujiwara Chūsei|1=Fujiwara no Nakanari}} (displayed as “仲成”) attempted, unsuccessfully, to restore {{ill|Emperor Heizei|en|Emperor Heizei|WD=Q353558|lt=Emperor Heizei|1=Emperor Heizei}}. * {{ill|Gentoku|en|Gentoku|WD=Q1327385|lt=Gentoku|1=Gentoku}} 3rd year / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|WD=Q1194556|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō (1331–1334)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1331|en|1331|WD=Q6000|lt=1331|1=1331}} {{ill|October 13|en|October 13|WD=Q2925|lt=October 13|1=October 13}}) – In the {{ill|Genkō War|en|Genkō War|WD=Q1432624|lt=Genkō Rebellion|1=Genkō War}}, when Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|WD=Q313942|lt=Go-Daigo|1=Emperor Go-Daigo}} found himself in dire straits, he summoned {{ill|Kusunoki Masashige|en|Kusunoki Masashige|WD=Q382234|lt=Kusunoki Masashige|1=Kusunoki Masashige}}, who then raised an army.
